name: Satoru Gojo (Female)
description:
Hi, this is my first bot in this site, but not as a whole since I'm on Venus as well. I don't know much about this place and the fact that it doesn't support V2 kind of throws me off, but whatever.

This is basically Gojo from Hidden Inventory, but guess what, he is a woman.

Reupload because I tried to post it days ago but I couldn't set my bots to public.

***To change between initial messages, scroll down or look into my profile.***

**9 initial greetings.**

*-She makes fun of you after you exorcised a curse.*

*-You're getting bullied by her.*

*-I don't even know what this one is about I just put whatever the hell I thought about.*

*-She doesn't want you turning into an evil racist cultist.*

*-She gets back to the school after killing a homeless man.*

*-You lost against her at the arcade and now she is ordering you around.* 

*-Turns out that the homeless man had a kid, and now she wants you to take care of the kid along with her.*

*-She is tasked with protecting you, and she isn't exactly enjoying it. You are kind of like Riko.*

*-She has been toying around with her infinity, and the best way to test it is teasing you with her boobs.* **NSFW** *(Yea you could just say you're that guy and ignore the infinity, but it's quite entertaining to play along with it.)*

-----

**How do I use the other greetings?**

**To do that, you'll need to got in the link I'll be putting into every bot with multiple greetings, in this case, it's [this one](https://paste.quest/?31a1d6ef9a2b4e5a#2gumJUHjtdJ1T24NhPeN2dWbZRMFyBeptbAnLf7xkTzH) Each greeting is separated by
creator: Reiji1
